name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
     /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
     /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteYes"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
     /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteNo"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N)+1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ head < tail
      /\ head < K
      /\ tail < K
      /\ head' = head + 1
      /\ tail' = tail
      /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ head = tail
      /\ head < K
      /\ tail < K
      /\ head' = head
      /\ tail' = tail + 1
      /\ q' = Append(q, tail)
  \/ /\ head = tail
      /\ head = K
      /\ tail' = tail
      /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> -> SubSeq(file, i, Min(i+CHUNK_SIZE-1, Len(file)))]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sent_chunks
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks :
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, RetransmitCount(i))
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks :
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, RetransmitCount(i)+1)
        /\ RetransmitCount(i) < MAX_RETRIES
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks :
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, RetransmitCount(i)+1)
        /\ RetransmitCount(i) >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = <<>>  \* Give up after MAX_RETRIES

RetransmitCount(i) ==
    /\ i \in sent_chunks
    /\ \E j \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) : j = i /\ retransmit_count[j] = RetransmitCount(i)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>
